en.description_en: The spirit hall (tamaya) of Date Sanuji, classified as a tangible cultural property (building). It is town-designated by Watari. Located at aza Izumigairi 87-2 (Daiōji Temple).
The spirit hall (tamaya) of Date Sanemoto, classified as a tangible cultural property (building). It is town-designated by Watari. Located at aza Izumigairi 87-2 (Daiōji Temple).
The shrine hall (shaden) of Minato Shrine, classified as a tangible cultural property (building). It is town-designated by Watari. Located at Arahama aza Mizukura 113-2.
The main hall (honden) of Yasukawakahaku Shrine, classified as a tangible cultural property (building). It is town-designated by Watari. Located at Ōkuma-tazawa aza Sekishita 220.

en.name_en: Main Gate of Banshōzan Daiōji Temple
en.description_en: The main gate (sanmon) of Banshōzan Daiōji, classified as a tangible cultural property (building). It is town-designated by Watari. Located at aza Izumigairi 93 (Daiōji Temple).

items.name: 亘理領主伊達氏歴代墓所
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Successive Graves of the Watari Lords of the Date Family
en.description_en: The graves of successive generations of the Date family lords of Watari, classified as a monument (historic site). It is town-designated by Watari. Located at aza Izumigairi 87-2 (Daiōji Temple).
The masutori dance of Watari, classified as a folk cultural property (intangible folk cultural property, performing art). It is town-designated by Watari. Located in the Watari district.

The hōin kagura sacred dance of Ushibukuro, classified as a folk cultural property (intangible folk cultural property, performing art). It is town-designated by Watari. Located in the Ōkuma-Ushibukuro district.
The lion dance (shishimai) of Watari, classified as a folk cultural property (intangible folk cultural property, performing art). It is town-designated by Watari. Located in the Watari district.
